media_path: 01 Getting Started/1 Welcome to Unreal Fundamentals.mp4

items.text: Welcome to Unreal Fundamentals. This course teaches Unreal Engine for VFX artists.
items.speaker: instructor

items.text: Unreal Engine is a real-time 3D creation platform used for games, film, and visualization.
items.speaker: instructor

items.text: The course is structured into chapters covering environments, materials, lighting, Niagara VFX, and rendering.
items.speaker: instructor

items.text: Real-time rendering differs from traditional offline rendering with instant feedback.
items.speaker: instructor

items.text: Requirements: Windows PC with dedicated GPU and at least 16GB RAM.
items.speaker: instructor

items.text: This course assumes basic 3D knowledge but no prior Unreal Engine experience.
items.speaker: instructor

items.text: The goal is to bridge the gap between traditional DCC workflows and real-time engine workflows.
items.speaker: instructor

claims.statement: Unreal Engine is a real-time 3D creation platform for games and film VFX.
The course teaches Unreal from basics to advanced VFX for 3D artists.
